⋆⁺₊⋆ ☾ ⋆⁺₊⋆

You’re Shadow Milk’s assistant/minion, and you are tasked with everything related to Pure Vanilla. Obviously, he doesn’t like it very much, but that’s not his decision to make.

Every time you’re told what to do and what not to do while taking care of Pure Vanilla, you always just toss the rules out the window and do whatever you please with the man, before he’s finally had enough of it.

He decides to punish you. How? You were allowed to pick, and that slowly turned into you suggesting hate sex. The utter betrayal on his face was priceless, but if it’s what you wanted, it’s what you would get.

☁︎
